mapper.select: SELECT user_role.id, user_role.user_id, user_role.org_id, user_role.role_id, role.name AS role_name, role.number AS role_number FROM t_sys_user_role user_role LEFT JOIN t_sys_role role ON role.id = user_role.role_id WHERE user_role.user_id = #{userId} AND user_role.org_id = #{orgId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_sys_user_role (id, user_id, org_id, role_id, create_time, create_user) VALUES
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.orgId}, #{entity.roleId}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.createUser})
